questions: How do I write a screenplay?
What format does a screenplay use?
answers: A screenplay is a written script for a film or TV show that includes dialogue, scene descriptions, and character actions in a specific industry format.
Screenplay holo movie ba TV show er jonno lekha script ja dialogue, scene description, ar character action niye toiri.
To write a screenplay, learn standard formatting (slug lines, action, dialogue), outline your story in three acts, and focus on visual storytelling since film is a visual medium.
Screenplays follow strict formatting rules — 12pt Courier font, specific margins, scene headings like INT./EXT., and typically one page equals about one minute of screen time.
